title: Accept Invite Redirects to Error Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user accepting a team invite, I want to be taken to the dashboard successfully, so that I can start using the shared account without encountering errors.
description:
## Bug
A user (Jared) encountered an error when accepting a team invite — the accept invite link redirected to an error page instead of completing the invite acceptance flow.
acceptance_criteria: Accepting a team invite redirects to the dashboard successfully
No error page is displayed during the invite acceptance flow
middleware_changes: Fixed invite acceptance flow to properly redirect users after accepting a team invite.
implementation_notes: Bug was in the invite acceptance controller. Likely related to the same base_url validation logic fixed in MBT-300.
